mapper.sql: id , tenant_id, session_id, user_id, role, content, content_type, referenced_chunk_ids, retrieval_context, token_input, token_output, latency_ms, gmt_create, is_deleted
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO message (id, tenant_id, session_id, user_id, role, content, content_type, referenced_chunk_ids, retrieval_context, token_input, token_output, latency_ms, gmt_create, is_deleted) VALUES (#{messageId}, #{tenantId}, #{sessionId}, #{userId}, #{role}, #{content}, #{contentType}, #{referencedChunkIds}::jsonb, #{retrievalContext}::jsonb, #{tokenInput}, #{tokenOutput}, #{latencyMs}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, 0)
